name: l2_powered_source_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceValidationRunMatrix records whether powered-source result seeds can invoke hover or cruise validation.
note: Validation status packet before acceptance gates.

name: l2_powered_source_result_seed
column11: Seed evidence consumed by validation run status.

name: l2_powered_source_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRunMatrix supplies powered-source run status and delta slots.
note: Powered run evidence source.

name: l2_powered_hover_validation
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverValidation supplies hover validation target and tolerances.
note: Hover validation packet invoked only after seed readiness.

name: l2_powered_cruise_validation
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseValidation supplies cruise validation target and tolerances.
note: Cruise validation packet invoked only after seed readiness.

name: l2_powered_hover_acceptance_gate
note: Hover acceptance remains blocked without candidate results.

name: l2_powered_cruise_acceptance_gate
note: Cruise acceptance remains blocked without candidate results.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source validation evidence.
